title: api-cli config
description: Declarative CLI alias config for api-cli. Each leaf command renders a `command` template against {arg, flag, env, var, result, entry} and executes the result.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL used by editors for completion and validation. Ignored at runtime.

name.description: Binary's display name in help output.

description.description: Shown as the CLI's header in --help.

vars.description: Shared variables inherited by all subcommands. String leaves are template-rendered against {arg, flag, env}; child nodes win on key collision.

command.description: Executable form. A string is rendered then run via `/bin/sh -c <rendered>`. An array of strings is exec'd directly with no shell — each element is rendered, and the `spread` helper may splat a slice into multiple argv slots.

oneOf.description: Shell form: rendered as a Go text/template, then executed via `/bin/sh -c`.
Argv form: each element rendered, then exec'd directly with no shell.

cwd.description: Working directory for executed commands. Rendered as a Go template against the same data context as the command it applies to. Inherits down the tree (closest non-empty ancestor wins); a leaf step may override its leaf's cwd. Empty/unset means the calling process's cwd.

stdin.description: Input fed to the child process's stdin. Rendered as a Go template against the same data context as the command it applies to. Inherits down the tree (closest non-empty ancestor wins); a leaf step may override its leaf's stdin. When empty/unset, the child inherits the parent process's stdin.

commandNode.description: A node in the CLI tree. A node with no `commands` is a leaf; leaves execute. Group nodes just print help.

name.description: Subcommand name. Cannot contain whitespace or slashes, and cannot be `help`, `completion`, or `__complete` (reserved by cobra).

args.description: Positional args. Required args must precede optional ones; a variadic arg must be last.

steps.description: Leaf-only. Pre-execution stages run sequentially; each step's stdout is captured, parsed as JSON if valid, and exposed under `.result.<name>`.

entry.description: Leaf-only. Arbitrary user-defined JSON. String leaves are template-rendered and the result is exposed to the command template as `.entry`.

preconditions.description: Leaf-only. Templates evaluated against {arg, flag, env, var} before any step or command runs. Any non-empty (post-trim) result is treated as a fatal error message; the leaf exits 1.

commands.description: Nested subcommands. If present and non-empty, this node is a group and may not declare `entry`, `steps`, or `preconditions`.

entry.description: Rendered like a leaf `entry`; available as `.entry` when this step's command runs.

required.description: Required args must precede optional ones.

variadic.description: Last-only. Collects all remaining positional values into a typed slice. Pair with the `spread` helper to splat into argv form.

name.description: Long form (--limit); accessed as `{{.flag.name}}`. Must not start with `no-` (reserved for bool negation).

default.description: Value when the flag isn't set. For string flags, this may itself be a Go template; it's rendered against {arg, env, var} only when the user did not pass the flag.

conflicts.description: Sibling flag names that may not be set together.
